news.title: Letterboxd, the social platform for film buffs, reportedly looking for new owner
news.summary: Potential buyers of Letterboxd include Versant, the parent company of CNBC and MS NOW, and Hollywood media company The Ankler, according to Semafor.

news.title: Consumers lost $2.1B to social media scams in 2025, FTC reports
news.summary: The agency reports that losses from social media scams have increased eightfold and that social media scams resulted in higher losses than any other method scammers used to contact consumers.

news.title: OpenAI ends Microsoft legal peril over its $50B Amazon deal
news.summary: OpenAI has won major concessions from its largest shareholder, Microsoft, that will allow it to sell products on AWS, while Microsoft gets more cash in a revenue-share agreement.

news.title: DeepMind’s David Silver just raised $1.1B to build an AI that learns without human data
news.summary: Ineffable Intelligence, a British AI lab founded a mere few months ago by former DeepMind researcher David Silver, has raised $1.1 billion in funding at a valuation of $5.1 billion.

news.title: Hacker who allegedly carried out cyberattacks for China is extradited to US
news.summary: Xu Zewei is accused of participating in a Chinese government hacking group that broke into thousands of U.S. organizations and stole COVID-19-related research.

news.title: Google is testing AI chatbot search for YouTube
news.summary: Google is trying out an AI Mode-like search experience for YouTube. The company is now testing "a new way to search on YouTube that feels more like a conversation," with results pulling in things like longform videos, YouTube Shorts, and text about what you're searching for. news.title: Canonical lays out a plan for AI in Ubuntu Linux
news.summary: One of the most popular Linux distributions is about to get an influx of AI features. As reported by Phoronix, Jon Seager, VP of engineering at Ubuntu developer Canonical, shared a blog post on Monday detailing plans to add AI features to the Linux distro over the next year. news.title: Trump demands ABC fire Jimmy Kimmel
news.summary: President Donald Trump is calling for Disney to fire Jimmy Kimmel. On Thursday, Kimmel joked that Melania Trump had looked like an "expectant widow" in a skit about the upcoming White House Correspondents' Dinner. The skit aired days before an armed gunman made an assassination attempt at the event,

news.title: Google employees ask Sundar Pichai to say no to classified military AI use
news.summary: Over 600 Google employees signed a letter to CEO Sundar Pichai demanding that Google block the Pentagon from using its AI models for classified purposes, reports the The Washington Post. news.title: Conspiracy theories are swirling about the White House Correspondents’ Dinner shooting
news.summary: On Saturday evening, a room full of journalists, media personalities, and senior members of Donald Trump's administration descended into chaos as gunshots rang out at the White House Correspondents' Dinner. news.title: Put it in pencil: NASA's Artemis III mission will launch no earlier than late 2027
news.summary: SpaceX and Blue Origin tell NASA their lunar landers will be ready for Artemis III in late 2027.

news.title: Open source package with 1 million monthly downloads stole user credentials
news.summary: If you're one of millions using element-data, it's time to check for compromise.

news.title: Musk and Altman face off in trial that will determine OpenAI's future
news.summary: Musk’s shifting stance on AI dangers may complicate trial over OpenAI’s mission.

news.title: OpenAI ends its exclusive partnership with Microsoft
news.summary: Amended agreement clears the way for OpenAI models to run on Amazon Bedrock.

news.title: EU tells Google to open up AI on Android; Google says that's "unwarranted intervention"
news.summary: Gemini gets preferential treatment on Android, but maybe not for long (in Europe).

news.title: Some Musk v. Altman Jurors Don't Like Elon Musk
news.summary: Musk’s lawsuit challenges OpenAI’s evolution under Sam Altman. But during jury selection, several potential jurors voiced negative views of Musk himself.

news.title: The M5 MacBook Air Has Never Been Cheaper
news.summary: Despite launching less than two months ago, the M5 MacBook Air has dropped back down to its lowest price since launching.

news.title: Elon Musk Boosts New Yorker’s Sam Altman Exposé on X as Trial Begins
news.summary: The move comes as the trial for Elon Musk’s lawsuit against OpenAI kicks off in federal court in Oakland.

news.title: Cole Allen Charged With Attempting to Assassinate Trump
news.summary: The suspected shooter at Saturday night’s White House Correspondents’ Dinner faces three felony charges. He remains in custody following Monday’s hearing.

news.title: A Brain Implant for Depression Is About to Be Tested in Humans
news.summary: While many brain-computer interface companies are focused on helping paralyzed people communicate, Motif Neurotech is targeting mental health disorders.
